title: Viborg, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Viborg, Central Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Viborg is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 42,000. One of Denmark’s oldest cities, known for its twin-towered cathedral, lake district, and historic town square.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
